title: Run corelib prelude lowering tests in release profile on Linux

source.subject: fix(ci): run corelib prelude lowering tests in release profile on Linux

body:
## Outcome

Run corelib prelude lowering tests in release profile on Linux.

## Context

- Workstream **ci-release** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **CI workflows and deploy infra** (`v02-ci-deploy-infra`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`b7df839`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/b7df839) — fix(ci): run corelib prelude lowering tests in release profile on Linux
